body: This PR adds the test script `test/Operators/finitedifference/stencil_operations.jl`, which checks for the correctness of `src/Operators/operator2stencil.jl` and `src/Operators/pointwisestencil.jl`. This should make it easier to fix the issue of memory allocation during stencil application/composition at the right boundaries of Fields. This PR also extends `Operator2Stencil` to work for all F2C and C2F Operators, including flux correction (which needs to get added to the implicit tendency function); it also fixes some minor bugs in stencil operations.
title: Add unit tests for stencil operations

body: Until we can figure out what is causing the failures.
